updatedAt: <ISO timestamp — set from command output, e.g. date -u>
note: Machine-written volatile state for a drive loop. Policy lives in the versioned policy file / SKILL.md. Update ONLY from command output, never from recollection. Derivable facts (CI status, HEAD sha, review lists) are NOT stored here — derive them fresh each cycle.

current.phase: <human-readable: what was last done, what is awaited>

userDecisions.decision: <verbatim-ish record of an explicit human decision>

standingConstraints: <hard rules copied from policy that must survive any context loss, e.g. do-not-merge list>
